tagline: Offering piano lessons in the Seattle area — $70/hour
description: Private piano lessons with Julian Seasholtz, an experienced pianist with 12 years of piano and 7 years of viola. Available weekends in the Seattle area.

services.name: Private Piano Lessons
services.description: One-on-one piano instruction for all skill levels — beginner to advanced. Classical, pop, or whatever you want to learn.

services.name: Beginner Piano
services.description: Never touched a piano before? No problem. We start from scratch and make it fun.

services.name: Music Theory
services.description: Understand the language of music. Great for students who want to go deeper.

seo.title: Chord Champion — Piano Lessons Seattle
seo.description: Private piano lessons in the Seattle area with Julian Seasholtz. $70/hour, weekends available. All skill levels welcome.
